snippet.title: Tabaahi 🔥| Toxic (Hindi) | Rocking Star Yash, Kiara Advani, Tara Sutaria| Vishal Mishra, Raj Shekhar
snippet.description:
Tabaahi ❤️✨ — a melody that speaks straight to the heart.

Featuring Yash and Kiara Advani, this soulful track is beautifully sung and composed by Vishal Mishra. Let its heartfelt lyrics and mesmerizing melody stay with you long after the music ends. 🎶

🎵 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁𝘀
Song: Tabaahi
Movie: Toxic - A Fairy Tale for Grown-Ups
Vocal & Composition: Vishal Mishra
Lyrics: Raj Shekhar
Music Assistants: Kumar Gaurav Singh, Trihangku Lahkar, Bitupon Boruah & Kandarpa Kalita
Music Production: Vishal Mishra, Bitupon Boruah, Kandarpa Kalita & Trihangku Lahkar
Guitars: Kandarpa Kalita
Drums: Trihangku Lahkar
Synths: Kandarpa Kalita & Bitupon Boruah
Backing Vocals: Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah & Trihangku Lahkar
Brass & Woodwinds Arranged by: Vishal Mishra 
Dubbed in Prague by: Steve Ferry 
Vocal Dub Coordinator: Santhosh Venky
Recorded, Mixed & Mastered by: Trihangku Lahkar @VMS

🎬 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁 & 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘄
Starring: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria & Rukmini Vasanth
Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions & Monster Mind Creations

Lyrics:
तोड़ो, सारे उसूलों को
छोड़ो, जाने दो भूलो को
तू हो बाहों में Aur  हर जगह तबाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Todo, Saare Usoolon Ko
Chhodo, Jaane Do Bhoolo Ko
Tu Ho Baahon Mein Aur Har Jagah Tabaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

ये लहर, ये हवा
कब चली पूछ के
रूह पे, क्यूँ भला
हो कोई बंदिशें
दुनिया के दस्तूर से आज ले रिहाई
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Yeh Lahar, Yeh Hawaa
Kab Chali Poochke
Rooh Pe, Kyun Bhala
Ho Koi Bandishein
Duniya Ke Dastoor Se Aaj Le Rihaayii
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

तू मुझे छील दे सांस की आग से
हर धड़क पे दोनो हो फना राख से
हर गलत सही-रेत पे लिखी गवाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही

Tu Mujhe Chheel De, Saans Ki Aag Se
Har Dhadak Pe Dono Ho Fana Raakh Se
Har Galat Sahi- Ret Pe Likhi Gawaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

#Tabaahi #Toxic #ToxicAFairyTale #Yash #RockingStarYash #GeetuMohandas #KiaraAdvani

snippet.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender | Official Movie Trailer | Paramount+ | Avatar
snippet.description:
Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender premieres July 25 on Paramount+.

Based on the animated series created by Michael Dante DiMartino and Bryan Konietzko, this new story in the Avatar universe sees Aang learn of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

Watch More Avatar ➡️ https://bit.ly/4vDnUE3

Welcome to the Avatar: The Last Airbender channel – the ultimate home for all things Avatar! Here you will find the best battles, deep dives, and the most memorable moments from all of your favorite characters from Aang to Zuko. On top of that, there will be plenty of Legend of Korra, official Avatar Comics, and even more exciting original content! You don’t need a sky bison to swing on by to the Avatar: The Last Airbender channel for all our new videos!

Subscribe to join Team Avatar and be the first to get notified of exclusive original content you won’t find anywhere else!

snippet.title: Official West End Trailer | Jesus Christ Superstar
snippet.description:
The London Palladium - Summer 2026 
Theatre Royal Drury Lane - Autumn 2026 
UK Tour - 2027

Book Now ⬇️
http://www.jesuschristsuperstar.com/

A global phenomenon that has wowed audiences for over 40 years, Jesus Christ Superstar is a timeless work set against the backdrop of an extraordinary and universally-known series of events but seen, unusually, through the eyes of Judas Iscariot.

It was the first musical by Andrew Lloyd Webber and Tim Rice to be produced for the professional stage and first came to major theatres when it debuted on Broadway in October 1971 at the Mark Hellinger Theatre in New York.

Less than 12 months after the Broadway show opened, the rock spectacle went to London, exploding onto the West End at the Palace Theatre in August 1972 in a hugely successful production. By 1980, after 3,358 performances, Jesus Christ Superstar had become the longest running musical in West End history at the time and grossed $12.3 million.

In all, Jesus Christ Superstar has grossed over $205 million and has been professionally produced in 42 countries around the world!

snippet.title: Ve Junoon | Awarapan 2 | Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani | Vishesh Bhatt | Mithoon, Sayeed Q., Subodhh
snippet.description:
Phir ishq karne chala kyun?
 
Beginning the musical journey of ‘Awarapan 2’, ‘Ve Junoon’ is composed by Mithoon, sung by Subodhh Sharma and penned by Sayeed Quadri. Featuring Emraan Hashmi and Disha Patani in the video, this song is yearning in its purest form.
 
#VeJunoon #Awarapan2 #EmraanHashmi #DishaPatani #Mithoon #SayeedQuadri #SubodhhSharma
 
Song Composed and Arranged by Mithoon
Lyrics: Sayeed Quadri
Singer: Subodhh Sharma
Song Creative Head: Anugrah
Music Production: Godswill Mergulhão
Music Assistants: Anugrah, Godswill Mergulhão, Eli Rodrigues & Kaushal Gohil
Guitars: Kalyan Baruah
Violin: Jitu Thakur
Backing Vocals: Abhishek Nailwal, Mihir Sharma & Kaustubh More
Recorded at Livingwater Music by A Manivannan
Song Mixed & Mastered by Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant Mixing Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai
Music Head Vishesh Films: Rohit Saini
 
Starring Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani, Shabana Azmi, Suvinder Vicky, Vijayant Kohli, Aniruddh Rawal, Atul Kumar
 
Vishesh Films & Mukesh Bhatt Present
A Vishesh Bhatt Production

Produced By Vishesh Bhatt
Directed By Nitin Kakkar
Director of Photography Vishnu Rao
Editor Devendra Murdeshwar
Production Designer Teena Paradkar
Choreographer Mudassar Khan
 
Theatrical Distribution Pen Marudhar
In Cinemas 14th August 2026

Tujhko toh sab hai pataa, aye dil Saari khabar hai tujhe
 
Banjar hui hai aankhen Veeran hai ye saansen
Ab meri rooh ko na jalaa...naa jalaa
 
Aage hai teri marzi Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye
 
Phir Ishq karne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil lutne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye Phir Ishq karne chala kyun…

OOOOOOOOOO.. OOOOOOOOOO..

Dil ko sukoon milaa..haan milaaaa

About YRF Spy Universe: 
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, released on 3 July 2026.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Review
snippet.description:
Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced reviewed by Jarrett Green on PC, also available on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S.

"While the original Black Flag holds up well enough that it probably wouldn’t have been my first pick for an Assassin’s Creed remake, sailing the high seas, sending other tubs to Davy Jones’ Locker, uncovering ancient secrets, and asking “What does that have to do with me getting rich, exactly?” have made it clear Resynced was a necessary second pass over one of the best games in the series. More than just a face lift, it also brings Black Flag’s systems and sensibilities up to today’s standards. Both land and sea combat have been bolstered by new tricks that add depth and clarity to all of the action. The top-tier story of the Kenway patriarch proves it’s beloved for a reason, with extra content that further fleshes out certain character moments. Missions have been adjusted and restructured just enough to take advantage of the mostly smart updates to parkour and stealth. Even where it stumbles, like its long-standing issues with overly sticky free running or sometimes dumb enemies, it never feels like a step backward. As a result, there's never been a better time, or a better way, to return to the Golden Age of Piracy."

snippet.title: Dinosaurs of the Wild West | Official Kickstarter Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
Worldwide Pre-Order on Kickstarter Now: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/sparkefilms/dinosaurs-of-the-wild-west-series

From the creative team behind the 2025 cult-dinosaur feature PRIMITIVE WAR comes an ambitious new original cinematic universe: DINOSAURS OF THE WILD WEST.

In an alternate frontier, humanity navigates a dangerous land where every journey, every town, and every war depends on the giant creatures that shaped civilization itself. Dinosaurs of the Wild West is an epic adventure series that reimagines the American frontier through a world millions of years in the making.

Massive Brontosaurs haul entire towns across the frontier.
Raptors are ridden into battle.
Pterosaurs rule the skies.

For generations, humans and dinosaurs shaped the world together.
Now something is coming that threatens to change that forever.

Narrated by actor Jesse Kove. Inspired by the illustrated world of creator Shaun Keenan. 

Alongside the full trailer, DINOSAURS OF THE WILD WEST Kickstarter campaign unveils  a mix of EARLY BIRD and LIMITED EDITION rewards that include:
 VIP ON SET EXPERIENCES
 FIRST EDITION TRADING CARD SET
 BEHIND THE SCENES ACCESS
 ASSOCIATE PRODUCER CREDITS
 And the opportunity to CREATE A DINOSAUR for the series.

Stretch goals for the campaign include expanded creature sequences, additional cinematic set pieces, major guest appearances, and the unlocking of future episodes. 

Currently the ONLY way to watch is to pre order the series through kickstarter. 

ABOUT THE PROJECT
Dinosaurs of the Wild West is an original cinematic universe created by filmmaker Luke Sparke and developed alongside a team of artists and visual effects talent behind Primitive War and multiple internationally released feature films. It’s produced by Carmel Imrie, Carly Sparke and Luke Sparke with Executive Producers Geoff Imrie, Eric Weick, Colin Hurdle, Kelly Clifford, Luke Sparke

The two promos were completed in house by Luke Sparke, Sparke Films, Let It Be Entertainment and Sparke Effects including VFX artists Vivian David, Jared Johnson, Mark Griffiths, Julien Romeo, Felipe Gonzalez, Evan Robinson, Alejandro Agudelo and in conjunction with Kubo vfx studio. VFX Supervison by Luke Sparke, Post Produced by Carly Sparke, Executive Creative Brooke Marsden and original score by Frederik Wiedmann.

Instagram:  @dinosaursofthewildwesttv & @primitivewarmovieofficial  
TikTok: @primitivewarmovie
Facebook:  @primitivewarmovie
Official Site: DOTWW.com

snippet.title: Age of Umbra: Sallowlands | Official Trailer | A Daggerheart Miniseries
snippet.description:
The Sallowlands beckon—immerse yourself into the world and characters of this new Daggerheart mini-series premiering July 9th! Rumors swirl of a gargantuan metropolis appearing suddenly, deep in the cracked ancient lakebed of the Sallowlands. Five survivors hope that finding it will give them what they each desperately need.

AGE OF UMBRA: SALLOWLANDS
A group of outcasts and survivors brave blasted lands in search of answers in Age of Umbra: Sallowlands. This 6-part Daggerheart mini-series features Game Master Matthew Mercer and players Laura Bailey, Jennifer English, Abubakar Salim, Vico Ortiz, and Zachery Renauldo. They’ll form an unlikely band of companions, who venture off the beaten path in search of answers in the Sallowlands, a new region of the Halcyon Domain filled with cracked badlands, dangers, and awe-inspiring secrets. What fragile hopes dare they cling to in this story of desperation and survival? Learn more at https://critrole.com/umbra

BEACON
Curious what happens when the camera turns off after an Age of Umbra episode? Watch the Cooldown episodes with the cast discussion after each episode, exclusively on Beacon! Start your 7-day free trial today at https://beacon.tv/join and get unparalleled access to the shows you love completely ad-free! You’ll receive NEW Beacon exclusive series, instant access to VODs & podcasts, live event pre-sales, merch discounts, & a private Discord.

DAGGERHEART: HOPE & FEAR
The first expansion for Daggerheart comes out August 25th and features new classes (Witch, Warlock, Assassin, Brawler), transformation cards, adversaries, campaign frames, and much more.
